mode.description: 'person' to find contact info for a specific person. 'company' to enrich a company by domain.

first_name.description: Person's first name. Used with last_name + domain/organization_name.

domain.description: Employer domain e.g. 'acme.com' (no www or @). Preferred over organization_name.

organization_name.description: Employer name e.g. 'Acme Corp'. Use domain if possible.

linkedin_url.description: LinkedIn profile URL. Overrides name+domain if provided.

reveal_phone.description: Include phone numbers. Costs extra credits.
